caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt featuring the white text "ION NEVÈR DO SHIT". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a stand. Behind him, the room contains several framed photos on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. To the right, a rack of clothing is visible. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "SIT DOWN" and a red logo on the right that reads "REALLY TOT". As the scene progresses, the man shifts his expression and head position, moving from a downward gaze with closed eyes to looking forward and speaking, with his mouth open in the final frames. The background and equipment remain static throughout the sequence.
